mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement-where your every whim becomes our priority. Because you deserve nothing less!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I walked into a coffee shop, and the barista had the audacity to misspell my name on the cup. Can you believe it? I mean, how hard is it to spell "Josh" correctly, right? I took one look at that cup, felt my entitlement rising to the surface, and let me tell you, I demanded a public apology right then and there. And you know what? They gave it to me. Because at the end of the day, when you're as hot as I am, people should know your name-spelled correctly, of course.
